appSettingsDialogHint: Theme, defaults, engines, diagnostics, and backup in one place.
appSettingsHotkeyPasteUrlGlobal: Paste URL (when focus is not in a text field)
appSettingsOpenDownloadsTab: Open Downloads tab for more options
appSettingsResetConfirmHint: Click again to reset all settings (window positions are kept).
appSettingsSectionHintDefaults: Download folder and batch export output directory.
appSettingsSectionHintDependencies: Engine paths, update check, and manual NVENC/VAAPI smoke checklist on your hardware.
appSettingsHwManualSmokeIntro: Real GPU runs are not automated in CI. Check steps here or copy the checklist for your report (also in Support ZIP as hwManualSmoke:).
appSettingsHwManualSmokeCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryWin: On this OS the Windows — NVENC section is listed first.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryLinux: On this OS the Linux — VAAPI section is listed first.
appSettingsHwManualSmokePrimaryOther: macOS: run both sections or VideoToolbox separately; pick what matches your export path.
appSettingsSectionHintGeneral: Language, theme, display scale (HiDPI), and URL paste behavior.
appSettingsHidpiActiveTier: Active CSS rules for {percent}% (@{dpi}dpi block in main.css)
appSettingsHidpiManualHint: In Settings → Display → Scale, try 100, 125, 150, and 200%, restart FluxAlloy, and confirm text and buttons are not clipped.
appSettingsHidpiCheckEditor: Editor — top bar, preview, timeline, FFmpeg rail;
appSettingsHidpiCheckDownloads: Downloads tab — URL bar, queue table, lower panels;
appSettingsSectionHintHotkeys: Accelerators from the main menu (may differ on macOS).
appSettingsSectionHintLogs: Open logs, create a support archive, or open About for more tools.
appSettingsSectionHintReset: Export or import settings.json, or reset to factory defaults.
settingsEnginesCheckUpdatesTooltip: Compare yt-dlp and FFmpeg versions with GitHub and download to app-data/bin when newer
